There is a star named ApUmvatsa, Child of Water, which is
situated due north of Citrd. When the Moon joins with Svati while
staying in the neighbourhood of Apamvatsa, the effect will be splen-
did and beneficial.

If there be snowfall on the 7ih lunar day of the dark fortnight
of the month of Magha during the Moon's stay with Svati, or if the
wind be very strong, or if the dark clouds thunder constantly, or if
the sky, where the Sun, the Moon and stars become invisible, is
